description: S100D + S100E + S100F + S100G + S100H: Backend tests and CI/CD on branch feature/backend-setup. Create the branch from current state, set up backend/ directory structure (copying app/ code), add pytest dependencies, create unit tests (cost_service, calculator_skill, web_scraper_skill, encryption_service, skill_registry), integration tests (health, auth, rate_limiting, connectors), security tests (headers, input_validation), e2e tests (web_app with playwright), and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows.
steps: Create and checkout branch feature/backend-setup from current HEAD
Create backend/ directory structure: backend/app/ (copy from app/), backend/tests/, backend/requirements.txt
Copy app/ contents to backend/app/ preserving all files: __init__.py, config.py, main.py, middleware/{__init__.py, auth.py, rate_limit.py}, routers/{__init__.py, projects.py, voice.py}

Create backend/requirements.txt with: fastapi>=0.109.0, uvicorn[standard]>=0.27.0, httpx>=0.26.0, python-multipart>=0.0.6, pydantic-settings>=2.1.0, python-jose[cryptography]>=3.3.0, passlib[bcrypt]>=1.7.4, pytest==8.2.0, pytest-cov==5.0.0, pytest-asyncio==0.23.8, playwright==1.44.0, pytest-playwright==0.5.0
Create backend/tests/__init__.py (empty)
Create backend/tests/unit/__init__.py (empty)

Create backend/tests/unit/test_cost_service.py - Since there's no cost service in the backend yet, create a simple CostService class in backend/app/services/cost_service.py that calculates token costs (similar to the frontend CostRates), then test it. Methods: calculate_cost(model, input_tokens, output_tokens) -> float, format_cost(cost) -> str
Create backend/app/services/__init__.py (empty)
Create backend/app/services/cost_service.py with CostService class

Create backend/tests/unit/test_calculator_skill.py - Create backend/app/services/skills/calculator_skill.py with a CalculatorSkill class that evaluates safe math expressions. Test basic arithmetic operations.
Create backend/app/services/skills/__init__.py (empty)
Create backend/app/services/skills/calculator_skill.py

Create backend/tests/unit/test_web_scraper_skill.py - Create backend/app/services/skills/web_scraper_skill.py with WebScraperSkill that validates URLs and extracts domains. Test URL validation and domain extraction.
Create backend/app/services/skills/web_scraper_skill.py

Create backend/tests/unit/test_encryption_service.py - Create backend/app/services/encryption_service.py with EncryptionService class that encrypts/decrypts strings using AES-256 (from cryptography or similar). Test encrypt/decrypt roundtrip.
Create backend/app/services/encryption_service.py

Create backend/tests/unit/test_skill_registry.py - Create backend/app/services/skills/skill_registry.py with SkillRegistry class that registers and retrieves skills by name. Test register, get, list operations.
Create backend/app/services/skills/skill_registry.py
Create backend/tests/integration/__init__.py (empty)
Create backend/tests/integration/test_health.py - Add a /health endpoint to backend/app/main.py, test it returns 200 with status: 'ok'
Create backend/tests/integration/test_auth_endpoints.py - Test auth middleware: missing header returns 401, invalid token returns 401, valid token returns user dict. Use httpx AsyncClient with app.
Create backend/tests/integration/test_rate_limiting.py - Test rate limiter: make max_requests+1 calls, verify last returns 429. Test with the projects endpoint.
Create backend/tests/integration/test_connectors.py - Test basic connector endpoints (projects CRUD) - create returns 201/403 based on plan, list returns 200.
Create backend/tests/security/__init__.py (empty)
Create backend/tests/security/test_security_headers.py - Test CORS headers are present, test that OPTIONS requests are handled.
Create backend/tests/security/test_input_validation.py - Test Pydantic validation: invalid hex color rejected, name too long rejected, etc.
Create backend/tests/e2e/__init__.py (empty)
Create backend/tests/e2e/conftest.py - Playwright fixtures (basic setup for browser-based tests)
Create backend/tests/e2e/test_web_app.py - Basic E2E smoke tests (test API docs page loads, test health endpoint via browser)
Create backend/pytest.ini with [pytest] configuration: asyncio_mode=auto, testpaths=tests, markers for unit/integration/security/e2e

Create .github/workflows/ci.yml - Main CI pipeline with: backend-tests job (install deps, run pytest with coverage), flutter-analyze job (flutter pub get, flutter analyze), deploy-backend job (placeholder)
Create .github/workflows/pr-check.yml - PR validation (lint check, test check, coverage threshold)
Commit all changes on feature/backend-setup branch
acceptance_criteria: Branch feature/backend-setup exists locally with all backend test files
backend/ directory contains app/ with all source files (main.py, config.py, middleware/, routers/, services/)
backend/tests/ contains unit/, integration/, security/, e2e/ directories with test files
backend/requirements.txt includes pytest, pytest-cov, pytest-asyncio, playwright, pytest-playwright
All Python imports in test files match actual module paths (backend.app.*)
pytest runs successfully in backend/ directory (at least unit and integration tests pass)
findings: Python 3.9 environment required using `from __future__ import annotations` for PEP 604 union syntax (str | None) in FastAPI/Pydantic files. Added to voice.py, projects.py, auth.py, rate_limit.py. Also used Optional[str] from typing in Pydantic models. All 70 tests pass (50 unit + 10 integration + 7 security + 3 e2e) with 73% coverage. e2e conftest required session scope for base_url fixture due to pytest-base-url plugin conflict.
